name: operator can mark an entry as disabled by setting its enabled flag to false in the registry
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf 'sources:\n  - {id: cfpb, enabled: false}\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/PR-SOURCES.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/list-active-sources.sh" --registry .claude-tdd-pro/PR-SOURCES.yaml 2>out.txt && ! grep -q 'cfpb' out.txt && grep -q 'active_count=0' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
